title: Add MCP Protocol Integration
description: OpenCode already has MCP support! Core implementation exists in packages/opencode/src/mcp/ with server routes, CLI commands (mcp add, mcp list, mcp debug), OAuth, and config. This research task was based on incorrect analysis.
source: GitHub research (INCORRECT - OpenCode already has MCP)
